title: 'Senior Software Engineer'
date: '2025-09'
endDate: 'Present'
isCurrent: true
featured: true
duties:
  - Building a remote, sandboxed, agentic development environment from scratch, integrating terminal, chat, Jira ticket handoff, browser controls without need for port forwarding, and deep Git capabilities; garnering contributions and high-praise feedback across the engineering organization.
  - Developing a deployment lifecycle dashboard, enabling direct commit-level deployments and rollbacks between staging and production environments.
  - Integrating several new third-party vendors, allowing customers to seamlessly ingest data from the providers they use.
  - Delivering an automated penetration testing integration that surfaces security evidence and reports directly within the platform.
  - Mentoring backend and full stack engineers on web best practices and automated testing.
---
